_meta.title: Create YAML-based topology or edit existing OSPF/IS-IS
_meta.description: Build a network topology from a YAML file online, or modify an existing OSPF/IS-IS graph and generate reports based on the changes.
_meta.og_title: Create YAML-based topology or edit existing OSPF/IS-IS
_meta.og_description: Build a network graph from scratch, edit OSPF/IS-IS topology online or via REST API.
_meta.meta_keywords: topolograph, build topology online, YAML network diagram, OSPF design

textarea_placeholder:
Put Yaml file here:
nodes:
    10.10.10.2:
    10.10.10.3:
edges:
    - dst: 10.10.10.2
      src: 10.10.10.3
or edit already uploaded OSPF/IS-IS topology earlier 
...more examples you can find below
acc_examples_with_attrs: Examples. Yaml based topology with Node and Edge attributes
acc_examples_query_node: Examples. Query over node via Python (REST API & SDK).
acc_examples_query_edge: Examples. Query over edge via Python (REST API & SDK).
copy_paste_hint: Copy/paste this test topology to the input window above
